titleStmt.title: SII 30.53: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan

No. 53. (A.R. No. 130 of 1915.) Tirumurugaṉpūṇḍi, Avinashi Taluk, Coimbatore District Muruganātha Temple-on the south wall of the enclosure round the same maṇḍapa, inner side Jat. Sundara-Pāṇḍya: year 25: 1310 A.D.

summary.p: Damaged. Records the meeting of the tāṉattār of Tirumurugaṉpūṇḍi Āḷuḍaiyanāyaṉār and the members of Aḍikkiḻttaḷam at Aṇuvaṉ toṇḍaṉ Tirukkāvāṇam. They agreed to donate a piece of land to the temple and agreed to engraved at Perumpaḻaṉaṭṭār uḍaiyār temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . koccaṭappaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ
ci cuntarapāṇṭiya tevarkku yāṇṭu 2 10 5 vatu Uṭaiyār tiru
murukaṉpūṇṭi Āḷuṭaiya ṉāyaṉār koyil tāṉattomum A
ṭik kiḻttaḷattomum Aṇuvaṉ toṇṭaṉ tirukkāva
ṇattu niṟaivaṟa niṟaintu kuṟaivaṟakkūṭi perumpaḻaṉattā
r Uṭaiyār tirumalaiyil kalveṭṭiṉapaṭi namatu Uḻukaiyil
cūriyatevar maṉiya tevar yivvellaikku cettuṅ ke
ṭṭu kaiyil kārttikai mātam Ēḻā
ti varkku yiṟaiyāka viṭāṟu melaivayalil ca
kku kiḻakku kāḷiyāḻvārkku meṟkku ciṟukku
kku piḷḷaiyāṇṭārkkup peruṅkaruṇai
ṉ kaikkum teṟkku yiṉṉāṉkellai
ṭpaṭṭa vayalum puṉcaiyil nampiyāruraārkku
kiḻakku piṟaiyuṇicaṭaiyārkku meṟkku yivarkku
maṉaiyākavum Ātilāṇṭāṉ kuṟaikku yi
vvakai yivai yintavakai yiṟaiyi
liyākak ku kku Aṉupo
Digital edition of SII 30.53 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
